steps.t: Daervunn is at the northern edge of the Camp of the Host, where the road leaves the encampment and passes into Dagorlad. Aragorn has asked you to see …
Daervunn and Pippin are at the edge of the Camp of the Host, where the northward road leads into Dagorlad.
Aragorn is on the rise in the middle of the Camp of the Host. Daervunn reported that the men are ready to march.
Mithrandir is at the Camp of the Host on the border of Dagorlad. Something has worried Mithrandir and he wishes to speak to you about it.
Mithrandir is at the Camp of the Host on the border of Dagorlad. Mithrandir is worried about what might have befallen Frodo and Sam since they parted …
Mithrandir is at the Camp of the Host, on the border of Dagorlad.
Aragorn is on the rise in the middle of the Camp of the Host.
